title: Kdyby tisíc klarinetu
writer: Ján Rohác, Jirí Suchý, Ivan Vyskocil
actors: Jana Brejchová, Waldemar Matuska, Hana Hegerová
plot: A military base. An awkward soldier. A statue of Bach. And suddenly all guns in the area change into music instruments. Great mystery is immediately found by TV station. And soon the military base becomes a stage for huge TV show.
